channels.label: 科技

highlights.title: FBI agent explains how easy it is to ID people posting AI porn without consent
highlights.summary: A creepy saved post on Instagram linked man to AI porn account, FBI says.

highlights.title: Iranian hackers blamed for breach of Los Angeles transit system that took weeks to recover
highlights.summary: An Israeli cybersecurity firm said Iran’s government is behind Ababil of Minab, a fake hacktivist persona that has claimed a series of data breaches after the start of the war in Iran.

highlights.title: Trump abruptly cancels EO signing event after top AI firm CEOs declined to go
highlights.summary: Trump delays AI safety testing EO, claiming it would be an innovation “blocker.”

highlights.title: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
highlights.summary: Pope Leo XIV warned of the risks of AI and unconstrained technological power in his first major papal document released on Monday. Magnifica Humanitas is the pope's manifesto on "safeguarding the human person in the t...

highlights.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
highlights.summary: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.

highlights.title: Is Peter Thiel the target of Pope Leo's Gandalf quote? An investigation.
highlights.summary: Parsing a papal proclamation.

highlights.title: 7-Eleven data breach affects over 185,000 people’s personal data
highlights.summary: The data breach included names, dates of birth, postal addresses, and Social Security numbers, according to a state government listing.

highlights.title: Citing Gandalf, Pope Leo says we must "disarm" AI
highlights.summary: In an age of AI, Pope looks for "artisans of hope."

channels.label: 金融

highlights.title: Pope Leo is concerned about AI replacing human work. Traders share his concern long term
highlights.summary: The leader of the Catholic Church warned about artificial intelligence upending the labor market. Traders on Kalshi see unemployment jumping before 2030.

highlights.title: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
highlights.summary: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.

highlights.title: AutoZone stock has worst day in four years, despite retailer beating Wall Street estimates
highlights.summary: Concerns include international growth and margin compression as well as pressures from inflation, energy costs and potential supply chain disruptions.

highlights.title: Singapore reports lower-than-expected inflation for April at 1.8%, revises economic growth higher
highlights.summary: Core inflation — which strips out prices of private transport and accommodation — came in at 1.4%, against estimates of 1.7%.

highlights.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
highlights.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations

highlights.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
highlights.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

highlights.title: European markets head for mixed open as traders assess fragile U.S.-Iran truce
highlights.summary: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional investors assess the latest military operations against Iran.

highlights.title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
highlights.summary: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.

channels.label: 新闻

highlights.title: At the A.I. Epicenter, Technologists Dismiss Pope Leo’s Warnings About the New Technology
highlights.summary: Pope Leo XIV’s spiritual message on artificial intelligence arrived as Silicon Valley’s A.I. enthusiasts pursue their own spirituality through technology.

highlights.title: Researchers are building AI-powered robot labs. What does this mean for science?
highlights.summary: Thanks to new technologies like artificial intelligence, scientists are increasingly freed from the constraints of the laboratory. It raises questions about how much humans should outsource to robots.

highlights.title: Main Takeaways From Pope Leo’s Encyclical on A.I.
highlights.summary: In his letter, the first American pontiff called for putting care for humans at the heart of technological change.

highlights.title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
highlights.summary: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?

highlights.title: Xi Jinping Quit Smoking. China Still Cannot.
highlights.summary: China’s tobacco monopoly has become so financially vital to the government that even its powerful leader has failed to curb the country’s smoking habit.

highlights.title: Cornyn Crushed: 7 Takeaways From Tuesday’s Runoffs in Texas
highlights.summary: President Trump’s record of ousting those he sees as disloyal continued apace with Senator John Cornyn’s defeat. Whether his relationship with Senate Republicans can be repaired is another question.

highlights.title: Pope Leo takes aim at big tech in sweeping encyclical on AI
highlights.summary: "Magnifica Humanitas" tackles the social, economic and political challenges associated with artificial intelligence.

highlights.title: Artificial Intelligence Floods Court Dockets with Home-Brewed Lawsuits
highlights.summary: For years, courts have welcomed cases brought by self-represented litigants. Now those plaintiffs have A.I., and their filings are consuming more and more bandwidth.
